title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Runwal Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Runwal Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
